problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Phytoremediation. Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
